name: Direct Native API Syscall Invocation
description: Detects processes using ntdll.dll direct syscalls commonly used by malware to bypass security hooks
query:
// Detect suspicious processes loading ntdll directly
// Trigger on non-system processes calling native API functions
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(NtCreateThread|NtAllocateVirtualMemory|NtWriteVirtualMemory|NtProtectVirtualMemory|NtQueueApcThread)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
